decision_scope: None of the three executable candidates recorded here, WACS, WasmEdge, or wacogo, passed. This is not a universal claim about every released runtime or source snapshot.

input.profile: Stage 1 paused-duration timer and durable versioned KV profile

lineage.core_execution: WACS pure C# interpreter and WACS.Transpiler .NET IL path
closure_records: Wacs.Console.deps.json inside the SHA-256-pinned WACS.Cli package

facts: component and world.wit SHA-256 identities were checked before parsing
component-bytes=146486
core-modules=3 nested=1
core[0] imports=6 exports=17
timer arm/cancel/drop and KV read/conditional-put/drop imports were identified
export visa:continuity/workload@0.1.0 has sort Instance and index 2

typed_harness_probe.failure: Anonymous variant types not supported in v0.2 (case 'kv' of variant 'workload-error').
typed_harness_probe.failure_stage: Wacs.ComponentModel.Harness.Lib.WitTypeEmit.MapClrType while emitting the unchanged world's nested workload-error variant

facts: the installed WACS.Cli nupkg matched the recorded SHA-256 before execution
build with the unchanged WIT directory exited 1 because v0 contract validation cannot compare either interface import
build without the WIT contract exited 0 and produced a 311296-byte raw assembly
the raw assembly exposes exactly six core imports and seven raw workload exports
raw activate has a single i32 indirect-area parameter and no typed workload surface was emitted
raw transpiler status execution exited 128 without a structured result
NativeAOT with the unchanged WIT directory exited 1 at the same interface-import contract check
cli_transpiler_aot_probe.failure_shape: CLI diagnostic text and a raw process exit; no vISA structured runtime boundary was reached.

additional_source_confirmed_blockers.detail: The released CLI contract validator reports every WIT interface-reference import as currently unvalidated and rejects this world before a typed build or NativeAOT surface is emitted.

activate flattens past MAX_FLAT_PARAMS=16. The released typed harness rejects that mode, while the raw AOT assembly exposes only the resulting i32 pointer; the transpiler source calls the typed ptr-bundle fallback a follow-up.

On the typed-harness path tested here, the generated resource wrapper constructor is internal and no public factory was reached for creating the two own<R> arguments. This finding is scoped to that public harness surface, not to every WACS host-package mechanism.

The exact released ComponentInstance public path is not a semantic bypass around the typed-harness and CLI failures. Its multi-core mode deliberately instantiates only the primary core module and skips the component adapter and post-return shim, while Invoke accepts only top-level Func exports. The unchanged vISA Component exports workload as an Instance; reaching its raw core exports would require adapter-authored Canonical ABI and is prohibited.

candidates.host_requirements: x86_64 Linux with glibc 2.28 or newer and the release lib64 directory on LD_LIBRARY_PATH

observation.failure_shape: CLI diagnostic text, not a vISA structured runtime failure
observation.failure: validation failed: invalid type reference; canon resource.drop: type index 10 does not reference a resource

candidates.maturity: Experimental source module published as a Go pseudo-version; no semantic release tag.
candidates.host_requirements: Go 1.25.5 or newer; the retained run used Go 1.26.5-X on x86_64 Linux.

lineage.wit_binding_generation_only: go.bytecodealliance.org/wit plus its embedded wasm-tools helper; this path is not used to translate or instantiate the Component binary

facts: the probe and generator rechecked the exact Component and world.wit SHA-256 identities
the Go proxy module zip matched its retained SHA-256 and module sum
the exact 23-dependency module graph and executable package lineage were checked fail closed
Engine.LoadComponent parsed, validated, and compiled the unchanged 146486-byte Component
both imports and the workload export were identified as interface instances
wacogo-witgen generated the key-value and timers host factories from the unchanged world.wit
both host factories and both host instances were built successfully
unchanged Component instantiation failed before any workload export could execute
observation.failure: wacogo: instantiate component: arg "import-type-kv-error" references unresolved type 24
observation.failure_shape: Deterministic Go error while executing the real nested-component instantiation plan; no guest workload call or vISA structured runtime boundary was reached.

source_confirmed_blocker.detail: The pinned instantiation path receives a nil SortType argument for the nested component because the direct interface-imported kv-error type remains unresolved. The public host instances passed the outer subtype check; the failure occurs when the real instantiation plan resolves nested type arguments.

later_public_surface_observation.status: not-reached and not used for the no-go decision
later_public_surface_observation.detail: The current world-export call surface does not expose a typed public constructor for host-created ValOwnHandle values. CallRaw would require adapter-authored Canonical ABI and remains prohibited.

preliminary_screening.evidence_level: discovery-only; versions and executable artifacts were not pinned
preliminary_screening.decision_use: none; WACS, WasmEdge, and wacogo support the executable no-go decision in this record

entries.reason: The official release was not advanced to executable qualification in this record. The source-only Airbus dev/cm_wasip2_complete fork at 2815b698949edabfe15754781e1fa35c260a0d2f is retained only as a future retest candidate; it has no pinned release artifact or vISA executable evidence here.
Not advanced to executable qualification in this record.
Not advanced to executable qualification in this record.
Not advanced to executable qualification in this record.
Preliminary lineage review found wasmtime-environ in the Component translation path; no executable qualification was claimed.

prohibited_bypasses: modify or flatten the accepted WIT world
build a runtime-specific guest or relinked semantic variant
hand-write the Canonical ABI indirect parameter area in the vISA adapter
fall back to Wasmtime or a Wasmtime-derived translator
publish a placeholder adapter, selector, or matrix cell
upstream_unblock_conditions: The unchanged WIT world produces a typed callable surface.
Contract validation accepts the two unchanged interface-reference imports rather than treating them as unvalidated mismatches.
Canonical ABI indirect parameter-area lowering exposes typed activate without changing its signature or requiring adapter-authored ABI code.
wacogo resolves the unchanged nested component's direct interface-imported type arguments, including import-type-kv-error, during real instantiation.
The host can create, transfer, invalidate, and drop own<namespace> and own<timer-binding> values through a public API.
All six timer/KV method and resource-drop imports execute through a real host bridge.
activate, safe point, freeze, fresh-instance restore or thaw, status, cancellation, and cleanup execute without fallback.
